crime.value: Poisoning death of Andrew - mix of nitroglycerin and hair bleach, unclear if suicide, accident, or homicide
crime.quote: A mix of nitroglycerin and bleach. Not household bleach, hair bleach.

victim.value: Andrew - found dead with poison in his system and evidence of sexual activity with both a man and woman
victim.quote: Andrew's pale body lay on a slab. His wound was still visible.

closed_world.value: High school setting where everyone knows each other and word travels fast
closed_world.quote: This was a big school, but word got around fast.

investigator.value: Trian Laurents - student who has access to medical files and is helping Adair investigate his brother's death
investigator.quote: I need more evidence to figure out who killed your brother.

suspect_architecture.value: High school social hierarchy with multiple suspects: Kennedy (false rape accuser), Elena (secretive plotter), Adair (victim's brother), Mr. Gammer (inappropriate teacher), Samuel (rival), plus unnamed others connected to Andrew's death
suspect_architecture.quote: After all, he'd been accused of raping Kennedy Harding, the most popular girl in school

red_herring.value: Kennedy's false rape accusation against Trian appears to be deliberate misdirection from the actual murder case involving Andrew's poisoning
red_herring.quote: Truth be told, that was a false report. Kennedy had been so afraid of losing her status

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence is revealed to reader: poison composition (nitroglycerin and hair bleach), foreign blood and bodily fluids found in victim, indicating sexual activity before death
clue_fairness.quote: A mix of nitroglycerin and bleach. Not household bleach, hair bleach.

social_world.value: High school caste system with Popular/Goth cliques, institutional power abuse by teacher Mr. Gammer, and secret tunnels suggesting hidden school activities
social_world.quote: Kennedy Harding had changed her look from Popular to Goth

reveal_mechanic.value: Forensic analysis of poison composition and bodily fluids, plus discovery of hidden tunnel system and money on card table suggesting gambling or other illicit activities
reveal_mechanic.quote: he came across a pile of money on top of a card playing table

media_and_audience.value: School gossip network rapidly spreading rumors about both the rape accusation and Andrew's death, creating public perception pressure
media_and_audience.quote: This was a big school, but word got around fast

investigator_wound.value: Trian is psychologically vulnerable due to false rape accusation destroying his reputation and social standing, making him desperate to prove innocence through solving the murder
investigator_wound.quote: He was sure everyone was staring at him. After all, he'd been accused of raping Kennedy Harding
